title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the architecture and orchestration layer around AI coding agents, comprising rules, skills, hooks, and subagents at the session level, plus multi-session workflow orchestration for scaling reliable agent systems. The harness represents the majority of a coding agent's complexity, not the underlying model.
